tools.name: clusters.batchAssociateScramSecret
tools.description: Associates one or more Scram Secrets with an Amazon MSK cluster.

tools.name: clusters.batchDisassociateScramSecret
tools.description: Disassociates one or more Scram Secrets from an Amazon MSK cluster.

tools.name: clusters.createCluster
tools.description: Creates a new MSK cluster.

tools.name: clusters.createClusterV2
tools.description: Creates a new MSK cluster.

tools.name: clusters.deleteCluster
tools.description: Deletes the MSK cluster specified by the Amazon Resource Name (ARN) in the request.

tools.name: clusters.describeCluster
tools.description: Returns a description of the MSK cluster whose Amazon Resource Name (ARN) is specified in the request.

tools.name: clusters.describeClusterV2
tools.description: Returns a description of the MSK cluster whose Amazon Resource Name (ARN) is specified in the request.

tools.name: clusters.getBootstrapBrokers
tools.description: A list of brokers that a client application can use to bootstrap.

tools.name: clusters.listClusterOperations
tools.description: Returns a list of all the operations that have been performed on the specified MSK cluster.

tools.name: clusters.listClusters
tools.description: Returns a list of all the MSK clusters in the current Region.

tools.name: clusters.listClustersV2
tools.description: Returns a list of all the MSK clusters in the current Region.

tools.name: clusters.listNodes
tools.description: Returns a list of the broker nodes in the cluster.

tools.name: clusters.listScramSecrets
tools.description: Returns a list of the Scram Secrets associated with an Amazon MSK cluster.

tools.name: clusters.rebootBroker
tools.description: Reboots brokers.

tools.name: clusters.updateBrokerCount
tools.description: Updates the number of broker nodes in the cluster.

tools.name: clusters.updateBrokerStorage
tools.description: Updates the EBS storage associated with MSK brokers.

tools.name: clusters.updateBrokerType
tools.description: Updates EC2 instance type.

tools.name: clusters.updateClusterConfiguration
tools.description: Updates the cluster with the configuration that is specified in the request body.

tools.name: clusters.updateClusterKafkaVersion
tools.description: Updates the Apache Kafka version for the cluster.

tools.name: clusters.updateConnectivity
tools.description: Updates the cluster's connectivity configuration.

tools.name: clusters.updateMonitoring
tools.description: Updates the monitoring settings for the cluster. You can use this operation to specify which Apache Kafka metrics you want Amazon MSK to send to Amazon CloudWatch. You can also specify settings for open monitoring with Prometheus.

tools.name: clusters.updateSecurity
tools.description: Updates the security settings for the cluster. You can use this operation to specify encryption and authentication on existing clusters.

tools.name: clusters.updateStorage
tools.description: Updates cluster broker volume size (or) sets cluster storage mode to TIERED.

tools.name: compatibleKafkaVersions.getCompatibleKafkaVersions
tools.description: Gets the Apache Kafka versions to which you can update the MSK cluster.

tools.name: configurations.createConfiguration
tools.description: Creates a new MSK configuration.

tools.name: configurations.deleteConfiguration
tools.description: Deletes an MSK Configuration.

tools.name: configurations.describeConfiguration
tools.description: Returns a description of this MSK configuration.

tools.name: configurations.describeConfigurationRevision
tools.description: Returns a description of this revision of the configuration.

tools.name: configurations.listConfigurationRevisions
tools.description: Returns a list of all the MSK configurations in this Region.

tools.name: configurations.listConfigurations
tools.description: Returns a list of all the MSK configurations in this Region.

tools.name: configurations.updateConfiguration
tools.description: Updates an MSK configuration.

tools.name: kafkaVersions.listKafkaVersions
tools.description: Returns a list of Apache Kafka versions.

tools.name: operations.describeClusterOperation
tools.description: Returns a description of the cluster operation specified by the ARN.

tools.name: tags.listTagsForResource
tools.description: Returns a list of the tags associated with the specified resource.

tools.name: tags.tagResource
tools.description: Adds tags to the specified MSK resource.

tools.name: tags.untagResource
tools.description: Removes the tags associated with the keys that are provided in the query.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
